title: Rename device - new name in the Notifications
scenario: Device renamed via Device Settings > General still shows old name in notifications
steps: 1. Open Device Settings on the device.
3. Rename the device to a new name.
4. Save or confirm the new name.
5. Trigger a notification (e.g., disconnect the device, let battery run low, or check for updates).
expected: The notification should display the new device name.
